title: anastasis #0386
definition:
1) a raising up, rising (e.g. from a seat)
 2) a rising from the dead
    2a) that of Christ
    2b) that of all men at the end of this present age
    2c) the resurrection of certain ones history who were restored
        to life (\\#Heb 11:35\\)
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) a raising up, rising (e.g. from a seat)
 2) a rising from the dead
    2a) that of Christ
    2b) that of all men at the end of this present age
    2c) the resurrection of certain ones history who were restored
        to life (\\#Heb 11:35\\)

    NASB:  a standing up, i.e. a resurrection, a raising up, rising:
